import nibabel as nib
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path
import glob

data_root = Path\('/mnt/no1/yinhaojie/Task08_HepaticVessel'\)
imgs = sorted\(glob.glob\(str\(data_root / 'imagesTr/*.nii.gz'\)\)\)[:10]

for p in imgs:
    img = nib.load\(p\)
    axcodes = nib.aff2axcodes\(img.affine\)
    name = Path\(p\).name
    spacing = np.array\(img.header.get_zooms\(\)[:3]\).round\(2\)
    print\(f'{name}: orientation={axcodes}, shape={img.shape}, spacing={spacing}'\)
")

Bash(source ~/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate gm && python3 -c "
import nibabel as nib
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path
import glob
from collections import Counter

data_root = Path\('/mnt/no1/yinhaojie/Task08_HepaticVessel'\)
imgs = sorted\(glob.glob\(str\(data_root / 'imagesTr/*.nii.gz'\)\)\)

orientations = Counter\(\)
non_ras = []
for p in imgs:
    img = nib.load\(p\)
    axcodes = nib.aff2axcodes\(img.affine\)
    orientations[axcodes] += 1
    if axcodes != \('R', 'A', 'S'\):
        non_ras.append\(\(Path\(p\).name, axcodes\)\)

print\(f'Total: {len\(imgs\)} images'\)
print\(f'Orientation distribution: {dict\(orientations\)}'\)
if non_ras:
    print\(f'Non-RAS files:'\)
    for name, ori in non_ras:
        print\(f'  {name}: {ori}'\)
else:
    print\('All images are already RAS!'\)
")
